overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist walking through a sunlit medieval Middle Eastern city. The character moves through stone archways, covered passages, and bustling streets with Islamic architecture, eventually reaching a shaded garden market area with palm trees and a donkey.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone archway entrance to historic district

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering the large ornate stone archway

notable_agents.action: child in green robe walking ahead through the archway

entered.detail: large ornate stone archway with Islamic geometric patterns and carved details
tall textured sandstone walls flanking the entrance with decorative stonework

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the entrance to a historic stone archway in a Middle Eastern city. The hooded protagonist walks toward the arch while a child in green robes walks ahead. The sandstone walls feature intricate geometric carvings, and the lighting is diffused as the character approaches the shaded entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone passage with hanging lanterns

events.description: exits the covered passage into a sunlit courtyard with trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor following an NPC in dark robes toward the light

notable_agents.action: man in dark robes walking ahead through the passage

entered.detail: stone corridor with arched ceiling and hanging brass lanterns
wooden bench with red cushion against the passage wall
green leafy trees visible through the archway exit

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a covered stone passage with hanging lanterns, following an NPC in dark robes. Around 8 seconds, the scene transitions as the character exits the shaded corridor into a bright sunlit courtyard with visible trees and flowering plants ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit street with flowering vines and sandstone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing buildings covered in vibrant purple flowering vines

notable_agents.action: two women in long robes conversing on the left side of the street

entered.detail: vibrant purple bougainvillea cascading down building facades
wooden cart loaded with hay bales parked against the wall
wide stone staircase leading upward to the next level of the city

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a bright sunlit street lined with sandstone buildings covered in purple flowering vines. The camera passes a hay cart on the right and two women conversing on the left. Around 18 seconds, the character begins ascending a wide stone staircase toward the upper city level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper city street with guards and market activity

events.description: encounter group of guards in red uniforms standing watch near a banner

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs and continuing through the upper street past guards and vendors

notable_agents.action: guards in red uniforms with spears standing watch near a large red banner
pottery vendor arranging clay pots and jars on a woven rug

entered.detail: soldiers wearing red uniforms and carrying spears
display of clay pots and ceramic goods arranged on rugs
large vertical red banner with gold circular emblem

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the stairs and enters a busier upper street. Guards in red uniforms stand watch near a large red banner on the left, while a vendor arranges pottery on the right. The crowd density increases as the character navigates through pedestrians moving in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded garden market with palm trees and animal traffic

events.description: donkey walks past the character from left to right through the market
donkey passes close to camera temporarily blocking view of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow garden path and shaded market area with palm trees

notable_agents.action: donkey being led through the market crowd from left to right

entered.detail: tall date palms providing shade over the market area
teal and green fabric awnings over market stalls
rectangular stone planters with geometric patterns containing shrubs

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a shaded garden market area with tall palm trees and green fabric canopies over stalls. A donkey is led through the crowd from left to right, temporarily passing close to the camera around 42 seconds. The environment is lush with vegetation and features stone planters with geometric designs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded stone gateway through a sunlit urban district and into a lush garden market. It begins at the entrance of a historic sandstone archway, following a hooded protagonist and a child through intricately carved walls into a dim, lantern-lit covered passage. As the character exits the corridor, the scene opens into a bright, sun-drenched street lined with purple flowering vines and hay carts before ascending a wide stone staircase toward the upper city. The camera then moves into a bustling upper district where guards stand by red banners and vendors arrange pottery amidst a dense crowd of pedestrians. Finally, the environment shifts into a shaded garden market characterized by tall palm trees, green fabric canopies, and a donkey passing through the lush, vegetated space.
